notes: Flagship true-solvent sign printer. Dual-Array PrecisionCore TFP head. Optional White or Metallic Silver. Marketed as needing no special ventilation - a differentiator vs legacy true-solvent.

Mid-tier of the S-series ladder (S40600 entry / S60600 mid / S80600 flagship). Dual CMYK for speed. Listed discontinued by some dealers (Oct 2025) but widely in service; recorded as a real market machine.
Eco-solvent workhorse. Eco-Sol MAX 2 ink, GREENGUARD Gold. Mirrored CMYKKYMC head. VersaWorks RIP included.

configuration: Integrated print + cut; up to 10-colour eco/mild-solvent
notes: Integrated print-and-cut. Eco/mild-solvent SS21 (or dye-sub Sb54). Two staggered piezo heads. MAPS4 banding control, ID Cut automation.
Staggered dual-head mild-solvent workhorse. Eco-Ultra / Universal Mild Solvent (UMS) ink. Intelligent Interweave (i2) banding control, DropMaster auto head-height.
